2184090.name: Haru: The Armada of the Astral Void
2184090.description:
A spaceship, piloted by the courageous Haru, has wandered in some dangerous region of the astral void. With only the support of a dying starbase, our pilot must survive an incoming armada of vicious aliens that seek to destroy anything and everything.

Features:

  • Short games that will almost never reach 30 minutes
  • 60 perks to collect
  • 24 items/weapons to upgrade and combine
  • 33 unique enemies to discover
  • Kill enemies to collect rings that can be used to upgrade weapons and items at the starbase
  • Kill enemy spawn gates to collect ingots that can be used between games to give passive buffs to the ship systems
2184090.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
